top_signals.title: Asian Stocks Edge Lower With Fed Decision in Focus: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Asian stocks slipped at the open, tracking declines on Wall Street as investors rotated out of technology shares and positioned for the first Federal Reserve policy decision under Chairman Kevin Warsh.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: UK to ban social media access for children under 16
top_signals.summary: The ban will apply to all “user-to-user platforms, whose purpose is to enable social interaction and which allow users to post material, alongside algorithms,” according to a press release from the government’s Department for Science, Innovation and Technology.
